requestedCapabilities: bulk approve, close, and reassign operations
assigned, in-progress, blocked, and escalated states
notification providers for email, Slack, Discord, and webhook targets
escalation chains with fallback responders on timeout
nonGoals: Do not wire tasks-mux into the full agent stack for #577 in this process unless required for local tests.
Do not enable real external notification delivery by default.
Do not remove or break existing breakpoint routing, proven answers, or current CLI/MCP commands.
Do not require credentials for the default test suite.
qualityGates: All issue-requested capabilities are either implemented with tests or explicitly documented as unsupported/deferred with rationale.
Existing breakpoint JSON, CLI, MCP, and backend behavior remains backward compatible.
Shared backend capability tests cover git-native plus server/GitHub support or explicit unsupported-feature behavior.
CLI and MCP surfaces have parity tests and README documentation.
External notification and escalation providers are disabled by default and covered only through mocked integration tests.
State transition validation rejects invalid transitions and records history/audit entries for valid mutations.
Export/backup tests verify deterministic output and credential redaction.

planningNotes.issueStatus: Issue #596 was marked work-in-progress in a comment after a prior planning PR, but this process is authored as the requested fresh implementation plan.
planningNotes.processShape: Flat phased feature implementation with tests-first quality convergence; the issue gap is already known, so no HYPOTHESES tree is required.
planningNotes.repoOverride: Use agent tasks instead of kind: shell subtasks for this repo request. Keep breakpoints sparse and only for real scope/dependency decisions.
